narrative:
Washington Township has 1,571 registered voters, with 51.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.9 percentage points.
